name: Asj Inc.
summary: ASJ Inc. engages in the setting up and management of servers on the Internet in Japan. The company also provides cloud, payment, and Internet consulting services; and designs and develops computer software and smartphone applications. In addition, it leases and manages real estate properties. Further, the company provides planning, production, and management of website, as well as web shop, logistics, and ERP software services. ASJ Inc. was incorporated in 1984 and is headquartered in Kawaguchi, Japan.
